problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: If Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations is applied to in, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
